reference: This is my second Implanon, and it expired at the beginning of February. I have had unprotected sex, but my question is, do I have a chance of getting pregnant? Also, when I get it removed and get a new one put in, will that cause me any problems with being infertile since that will be nine years of being on birth control consecutively?
text: This is my second implant, and it expired at the beginning of February. I have had unproductive sex, but my question is: do I have a chance of getting pregnant? Also, when I get it removed and get a new one put in, will that cause me any problems with being infertile, since that will be 9 years of being on birth control consecutively?
